changelog: v2.9.1: WinRM静默失败修复+日志黑洞+采集状态精确标记+前端计时器响应式+告警规则脏数据降级
v2.9.0: fix WinRM NIC blank/memory unit/effective-policies 500/monitoring stuck/alembic fallback
v2.8.9: 修复WinRM指标空白(self参数)+AI graceful degradation+alembic兼容+ai_core异常处理
v2.8.8: 恢复CI/CD latest标签（正式发布）
v2.8.8: CI/CD本次不推latest标签（测试版本，防止Watchtower自动升级）
v2.8.8: 修复WinRM智能接入指标列表空白
v2.8.8: 修复登录500 - password_changed_at列类型varchar→timestamptz
删除docker-compose.yml中的代码volume挂载(3处)
v2.8.7: WinRM接入超时修复+采集性能优化
v2.8.5: 修复登录500 - UserInfo.password_changed_at类型应为datetime非str

download.note: Docker模式通过Watchtower拉取latest镜像自动升级，无需下载更新包

v2.8.0: 安全加固+Bug修复+基础设施改进
[高] python-jose→PyJWT迁移 (CVE-2024-53861)
[高] deploy-cn.sh内嵌compose同步5处差异
[中] Backend端口 162→1162/udp, 514→1514/udp
[中] Postgres密码: -c→printf pipe避免ps泄露
[中] encryption.py: 无效密钥不静默重生成+ERROR日志
[中] nginx.conf HTTPS重定向注释完善
[低] redis_pool async Lock + get_async_redis_client→async
[低] api_key permissions dict→list
[低] quick_create is_enabled=True
[低] capacity days_to_zero上限3650天
[低] IPFIX 6B RFC 7011 + Enterprise IE
[低] 前端Markdown统一 + request.ts any修复
v2.7.8: audit fix round - 20 files, 173 insertions, 64 deletions
Watchtower API 0.0.0.0→127.0.0.1
Backend 8000端口禁用
Redis健康检查: -a→REDISCLI_AUTH
nginx CSP connect-src移除通配符+server_tokens off
init_setup.py: 添加已初始化检查
assets.py: 重复IP→BizError + 权限修复
notification_service: DetachedInstanceError修复
alert_evaluator: SSH/WinRM side effects隔离
self_heal_engine: SSH连接try/finally
main.py: 告警订阅指数退避重连
sflow_v5: estimated_bytes修复
alert_governance: asyncio.to_thread
BizError 409 mapping + 优先级重排
router readOnlyFor guard + RouteMeta类型
v2.7.7: sFlow v5解析修复
sFlow header偏移: 6×I→8×I (24→32字节)
Expanded Flow Sample (type=3) 支持
sampled_ipv4 (format=3) 支持
协议识别: sFlow v5和NetFlow v5区分
assets.py UUID比较修复
